name: Arca Scisco
description: This scoped pistol analyzes strikes, learning how to damage its targets most effectively. Achieve maximum damage output after five successive hits.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This scoped pistol analyzes strikes, learning how to damage its targets most effectively. Achieve maximum damage output after five successive hits.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting Mesa's Peacemaker Ability unintentionally refreshing the Arca Scisco buff, but not actually increasing the Critical Chance. Casting Mesa's Peacemaker Ability should not activate/refresh the Arca Scisco buff .

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.3.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed being able to equip the Ruinous Extension Mod on the Arca Scisco. 
Fixed the Arca Scisco not tracking accuracy stats.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Hotfix 21.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Arca Scisco beam FX disappearing when Modded for high Fire Rate.
Fixed Clients not seeing the Arca Scisco beams.
